mnemonics: CUP for Comments: Comments are Useful for People
keyPoints: Single-line comments start with // and span to the end of the line
Multi-line comments are enclosed between /* and */
Javadoc comments begin with /** and end with */ and are used to generate documentation
commonMistakes: Nesting multi-line comments (e.g., /* outer /* inner */ */), which causes a compilation error
Forgetting that // comments do not have a closing tag and automatically end at the line break
